info.name: Acquia Cloud API - Private Networks
Private Networks
Acquia Create a New Private Network

items.docs:
Creates a new Private Network with optional subresource configuration.

This comprehensive endpoint allows you to create a private network and optionally configure 
its subresources (connections, VPNs, VPC peers, ingress, and isolation) during the initial creation.

**Subresource Creation:**
- **Connections**: Configure CIDR block and egress access settings
- **VPNs**: Create one or more VPN connections with tunnel configurations
- **VPC Peers**: Create one or more VPC peering connections
- **In

info.name: Acquia Retrieve a Private Network by ID

items.docs: Retrieves a Private Network by its ID.

info.name: Acquia Update a Private Network

items.docs: Updates an existing Private Network by its ID. Does not allow creation of new Private Networks.

info.name: Acquia Delete a Private Network

items.docs: Deletes a Private Network by its ID.

info.name: Acquia Get Connections for a Private Network.

items.docs: Retrieves the Connections block for a Private Network, including VPNs and VPC Peers.

info.name: Acquia Update Connections for a Private Network.

items.docs: Updates the Connections configuration for a Private Network by Private Network ID.

info.name: Acquia Get VPC Peers for a Private Network

params.name: limit
params.description: The maximum number of items to return per page.

params.name: offset
params.description: The number of items to skip before starting to collect the result set.

params.name: sort
params.description:
Sort the result set by one or more fields.

**Format:** `field1,field2,-field3`

**Sort order:**
- No prefix - Ascending order (default)
- `-` prefix - Descending order

**Multiple fields:**
- Fields are processed in the order specified
- First field has highest priority
- Use comma to separate multiple fields

**Examples:**
- `name` - Sort by name in ascending order
- `-created_at` - Sort by created_at in descending order
- `name,-created_at` - Sort by name ascending, then created_at descending
- `status,name,-updated_at` - Sort by status ascending, then name ascending, then updated_at descending

params.name: filter
params.description:
Filter the result set using field-based criteria.

**Format:** `field:value`, `field=value` or `field:operator:value`

**Logical operators:**
- `,` (comma) - OR logic between filters
- `;` (semicolon) - AND logic between filters
- **Note:** Cannot mix OR and AND operators in the same query

**Comparison operators:**
- `=` - Equals (default if no operator specified)
- `!=` - Does not equal
- `>` - Greater than
- `<` - Less than
- `>=` - Greater than or equal to
- `<=` - Less than or equal to
- `=@` - Contains substring
- `!@` - Does not contain substring

**Wildcards:**
- `*` - Wildcard character for pattern matching

**Examples:**
- `status=active` - Filter by status equals active
- `name=@prod` - Filter by name containing "prod"
- `status=active;type=standard` - Status is active AND type is standard
- `status=active,status=pending` - Status is active OR pending

items.docs: Retrieves the VPC Peers for a Private Network.

info.name: Acquia Add a New VPC Peer to an Existing Private Network

items.docs: Adds a new VPC Peer to the connections block of an existing private network

info.name: Acquia Get a Specific VPC Peer from a Private Network

items.docs: Retrieves details of a specific VPC Peer from a private network

info.name: Acquia Delete a VPC Peer for a Private Network.

items.docs: Deletes a VPC Peer for a Private Network by Private Network ID and VPC Peer name.

info.name: Acquia Get VPNs for a Private Network

items.docs: Retrieves the VPN Connections for a Private Network.

info.name: Acquia Add a New VPN to an Existing Private Network

items.docs: Adds a new VPN to the connections block of an existing private network

info.name: Acquia Retrieve a VPN for a Private Network.

items.docs: Retrieves a VPN for a Private Network by Private Network ID and VPN ID.

info.name: Acquia Create or Update a VPN for a Private Network.

items.docs: Creates a new VPN or updates an existing VPN for a Private Network by Private Network ID and VPN ID.

info.name: Acquia Delete a VPN for a Private Network.

items.docs: Deletes a VPN for a Private Network by Private Network ID and VPN ID.

info.name: Acquia Get Ingress for a Private Network

items.docs: Retrieves the Ingress configuration for a Private Network.

info.name: Acquia Update Ingress for a Private Network.

items.docs: Updates the Ingress configuration for a Private Network by Private Network ID. Ingress always exists for a Private Network.

info.name: Acquia Get Isolation for a Private Network.

items.docs: Retrieves the Isolation configuration for a Private Network.

info.name: Acquia Update Isolation Settings of a Private Network

items.docs: Updates the isolation settings of a private network
